title: You know who you're looking for. We have the platform to find them.
intro: Our matching engine surfaces candidates who fit your brand on data - investment, operating model, ambitions, background. Then our team takes over: honest conversations, proper prep, and introductions we actually believe in.

benefits.title: Matched by data, confirmed by us
benefits.description: Our matching platform scores every candidate against your brand profile across budget, operating model, growth ambitions and background before any human review takes place. The people we bring forward have been assessed as right for your model by data first, then by us.

benefits.title: Prep that protects your time
benefits.description: We walk candidates through your concept and unit economics before they ever meet you. They arrive informed, with real questions - not a blank look at your franchise disclosure document.

benefits.title: Inside knowledge on both sides
benefits.description: We've sat at franchise recruitment tables. We know what makes a franchisee go the distance - and we share that honestly with everyone we work with.

benefits.title: Selective about who we work with
benefits.description: We work with a limited number of brands at once. If we partner with you, we've assessed your model and we believe in what you're offering. That selectivity shows in the quality of introductions.

benefits.title: Aligned incentives
benefits.description: We're paid by brands when the right match is made - which means we only make introductions we believe in. Our reputation is on the line with every one.

benefits.title: Involved through the process
benefits.description: We stay involved from first conversation to franchise award. If something's not working, you'll hear it from us before it becomes a problem.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first conversation to franchise award.

steps.title: Tell us about your ideal franchisee
steps.description: Not just the checklist. We want to understand the profile behind the criteria - what makes someone succeed in your model, and what the common wrong-fits look like. That detail feeds directly into how our platform weights your matches.

steps.title: Our platform does the matching
steps.description: Your brand profile is run through our matching engine against every candidate in our network - investment level, operational model, growth ambitions, background. The platform scores fit objectively, with no bias toward availability or volume. We review the results before making any move.

steps.title: We prep before we introduce
steps.description: Before any introduction, we walk candidates through your concept, your unit economics, and what you're really looking for. They arrive prepared. So do you.

steps.title: We stay involved
steps.description: From first meeting to franchise award, we're in it with you. We manage expectations on both sides and help get the right people across the line.

idealPartner.title: Who we work with
idealPartner.description: We're selective about the brands we partner with. Here's what matters to us.

criteria.text: Hospitality franchise brands with clear and realistic unit economics
Established franchisee support systems and a genuine commitment to their success
Territory availability that makes introductions worthwhile
Transparency about investment requirements and what the model actually demands day to day
A long-term view on recruitment - the right people over fast numbers
